suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether `cargo build` is mandatory for every backend feature completion, or align skill success criteria with mission-level validator commands to avoid contradictory procedure tracking.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both rerun fix reviews (fix-cache-eviction-null-bootstrap and fix-cache-headers-status-gating) reported the same mismatch: transcripts and handoffs ran `cargo test` + `cargo check` but not `cargo build` while still marking procedure adherence as followed.

rejectedObservations.observation: Rust backend worker skill/cargo build mismatch observation (duplicate entry from second fix review)
